characters.name: Cristina
characters.description: CristinaFamilial InformationSiblingsEdson(brother)Professional InformationOccupationLawyerAppearancesSeasons1Portrayed byNaruna CostaCristinais one of the main characters in theNetflixseriesBrotherhood. She isEdson's sister and an honest and dedicated lawyer. Coerced by the police, she is forced to become an informant and work against her brother, whom she always idolised, by infiltrating theBrotherhood, a criminal faction under his leadership. As she does this, she begins to reconsider the morality of things. To be added

characters.description: EdsonFamilial InformationSiblingsCristina(sister)Professional InformationOccupationBrotherhoodfounder and leaderAppearancesSeasons1Portrayed bySeu JorgeEdsonis one of the main characters in theNetflixseriesBrotherhood. He spent some time in prison and became one of the founders of a rising criminal faction, theBrotherhood. Edson is alsoCristina's brother, but they have an estranged relationship. tough guy
